name: brain-connector
description: Brain Memory — Claude connector (remote MCP server). Reuses the brain-memory recall engine; exposes scored recall + status as MCP tools over streamable HTTP.

scripts.test: tsc --noEmit && tsx test/recall-flow.test.ts && tsx test/store.test.ts && tsx test/write.test.ts && tsx test/extract-safety.test.ts && tsx test/fail-closed-auth.test.ts
